name: TipRanks
description_short: Financial accountability platform that tracks and ranks Wall Street analysts, hedge fund managers, and financial bloggers based on their actual performance.
description_long:
TipRanks is a financial data platform that differentiates itself by tracking the actual performance of Wall Street analysts, hedge fund managers, corporate insiders, and financial bloggers. Rather than just showing consensus ratings, TipRanks ranks experts based on their historical accuracy and average returns, helping investors identify which voices are actually worth following.

The platform's Smart Score is a proprietary composite rating (1-10) that combines eight market factors: analyst consensus, blogger sentiment, hedge fund activity, insider trading, investor sentiment, news sentiment, technical analysis, and fundamental analysis. Stocks scoring 8-10 have historically outperformed the market. TipRanks tracks over 8,000 Wall Street analysts and 8,000+ financial bloggers.

Beyond analyst tracking, TipRanks offers stock screening, portfolio analysis, dividend data, institutional ownership tracking, and SEC filing analysis. The platform integrates with several major brokerages (Schwab, E*TRADE, Interactive Brokers) to provide ratings directly within trading platforms. The free tier offers basic analyst ratings, while Ultimate ($49.95/mo) unlocks Smart Score, advanced screeners, and portfolio tracking.
pros: Unique analyst accountability and performance tracking
Smart Score has strong historical outperformance record
Tracks hedge fund and insider activity
cons: Premium/Ultimate required for most useful features
Limited to US and some international equities
No charting or technical analysis tools
Smart Score is backward-looking and not predictive
Some data may be delayed on free tier
meta_description: Financial accountability platform that tracks and ranks Wall Street analysts, hedge fund managers, and financial bloggers based on their actual.
